name: Mailchimp | Arcade Docs
snippet: The Mailchimp auth provider enables tools and agents to call Mailchimp Marketing APIs on behalf of a user using OAuth 2.0 authentication.

name: Mailchimp Marketing API | Mailchimp Developer
